title: Coriander Cauliflower Rice
excerpt: CORIANDER CAULIFLOWER RICE Ingredients 1 large cauliflower 60 ml butter 125 ml slivered almonds 10 ml lemon juice Salt and pepper 125 ml fresh coriander Method Chop the cauliflower fine in the food processor Melt the butter and lightly fry the cauliflower in it Add the lemon juice and salt and pepper …
html:
CORIANDER CAULIFLOWER RICE

Ingredients

  • 1 large cauliflower
  • 60 ml butter
  • 125 ml slivered almonds
  • 10 ml lemon juice
  • Salt and pepper
  • 125 ml fresh coriander

Method

  1. Chop the cauliflower fine in the food processor
  2. Melt the butter and lightly fry the cauliflower in it
  3. Add the lemon juice and salt and pepper and taste!
  4. Mix in the almonds and stir-fry for 1 minute.
  5. Dish up and stir the finely chopped coriander through
